Name: Kimi K2.7 Code
Tagline: Kimi’s most capable coding model yet
Description: Kimi K2.7 Code is Moonshot AI’s latest coding-focused agentic model, built for long-horizon software engineering, 256K context, multi-step tool use, multimodal inputs, and around 30% lower reasoning-token usage than K2.6. Available in Kimi Code, Kimi API, and as open weights/code.

Name: Vercel Drop
Tagline: Drop it. It's live.
Description: Vercel Drop lets you deploy a file or folder by dragging it into your browser. You don't need Git, the Vercel CLI, or any local setup. Drop a project onto vercel.com/drop, pick a team and project name, and select Deploy. Vercel will create a new project, upload your files, and publish them straight to production with a live URL you can share. All in a matter of seconds.

Name: CakewordAI
Tagline: Point at anything to learn its name in any language
Description: Kids point the camera at anything — a cup, a teddy bear, a guitar — and Cakeword cuts it out into a sticker, says its name in the language they're learning, and adds it to their Word Dex. 100% on-device AI. No accounts, no ads, no data collection.

Name: Avatars in ElevenCreative
Tagline: A dedicated entry point for talking-head video
Description: The best AI voices, now with a face. Create studio-grade talking videos from a script, a voice, and an avatar - all in one place.

Name: NomNak
Tagline: Find restaurants through people you trust
Description: NomNak helps you find restaurants through people you trust. See where your friends actually eat, save spots to try, and build a Food Passport of everywhere you’ve been.

Name: Prometheus by Firecrawl
Tagline: A Forward Deployed Agent for web data.
Description: An experimental Forward Deployed Agent for web data from Firecrawl. Describe the web data you need and it writes Firecrawl code to collect it. Run it yourself or let us host and automatically maintain it as pages change.

Name: Bail: Fake Call Simulator
Tagline: Fake calls and alerts for a graceful exit
Description: Bail is an iPhone app for creating believable social-exit moments. Start a fake incoming call, lock-screen alert, low-battery shutdown screen, LED sign, or live-room simulation in seconds. It is built for awkward dates, meetings, parties, demos, role-play, and privacy practice. Bail does not place real calls, send real messages, or contact emergency services.

Name: GraceKit - Elegant Christian widgets
Tagline: Christian widgets, daily scriptures & sacred devotional art.
Description: Bring peace and grace to your device. Access over 240+ custom-typeset Bible verses, daily devotionals, prayers, and sacred classical oil paintings. Fully customizable colors, fonts, and sizes to fit your home screen aesthetic.

Name: GameBrain API
Tagline: Video games database API with 775,000+ games
Description: GameBrain is one of the largest video game databases and discovery services. Our API gives you access to 775,000+ games across 70+ platforms, with 767M+ user ratings, screenshots, videos, similar games, store offers, semantic search, and a unique Game Brain Score. There's also an MCP integration to connect game data to AI chatbots. Free tier available.

Name: Nox
Tagline: A quieter social app built around real moments
Description: Nox is a quieter social app built around moments instead of audiences. Share thoughts, photos, and short videos privately or publicly. Discover introduces a few people each day through a card-based ritual rather than an endless feed. Conversations begin from shared moments, not cold DMs. No follower counts. No public likes. No pressure to perform. Just moments, discovery, and genuine connections.

Name: MyStudyDeck
Tagline: Photos and PDFs become Anki flashcards — fully on-device
Description: Point your iPhone at a textbook page. On-device OCR, smart word filtering, and auto-translation turn it into flashcards — study in-app or exportapkg straight to Anki. No account, no cloud, no subscription. $14.99 once.

Name: iOrchard
Tagline: Know what your Apple gear is worth and when to sell
Description: iOrchard tracks the resale value of your iPhone, iPad, Mac and Watch, shows how fast each one is depreciating and flags the best window to sell before the next model lands. Fully on-device, no account, and it never invents a price it cannot back with real data.

Name: TiniAid
Tagline: Noise cancellation for your mind - soundscapes for ADHD
Description: TiniAid helps users create personalized, techno-inspired sound environments for ADHD and neurodivergent brains to help them control their stimulation level and focus on what really matters. Most ADHD focus tools are timers, streaks, reminders and blockers which tries to force you info focusing. TiniAid lets you pick a mood (Calm, Steady, Active, Intense), layer sounds and find a rhythm that works with your brain and not against it. It is built from real research on sounds and ADHD.

Name: audiOS
Tagline: The voice-only iOS keyboard with tape-deck controls
Description: opinionated voice-to-text iOS keyboard built for terminals, claude code, SSH sessions, and AI coding tools somehow amazing for everything else too

Name: Pickoo
Tagline: A free World Cup football contest with real prizes
Description: Pickoo is a free World Cup 2026 football contest. Pick winners and score for every match, earn points for correct picks, climb the leaderboard, and compete with football fans around the world. No complicated fantasy rules. No team building. Just pick the winners and have fun. 🏆 Leaderboard competition ⚽ Every World Cup match 🎁 Real prizes for top players 🆓 Free to play

Name: Turn podcast intoLinkedIn posts in voice
Tagline: Turnpodcast intoLinkedIn posts in your voice
Description: Upload an episode. Refrain transcribes it, finds the strongest arguments, and writes five publish-ready LinkedIn posts that sound like you wrote them.

Name: Logos
Tagline: Every app logo, ready to drop in.
Description: 15,015 free SVG logos for apps, dev tools and tech brands. Search, filter by category, download or copy in one click.

Name: Carsales Scraper
Tagline: Export Carsales vehicle listings as structured data
Description: Carsales Scraper turns public Carsales.com.au search pages and vehicle detail URLs into structured datasets. It helps buyers, dealers, researchers, and builders export prices, specs, sellers, locations, images, and source URLs.

Name: Delts
Tagline: One red button runs your workout — with an AI coach
Topics: iOS, Health & Fitness, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub
Description: Delts is an iPhone gym tracker with one rule: the red button runs your workout. Start it, log sets, reps and RPE while you train, stop — your session is timed, saved to history, and your calorie burn is estimated automatically. The AI Coach is different: it sees your real workouts, body progress, and goals, and can analyze photos of equipment, meals, or form. Everything local is free forever; AI is Premium. Open source, built solo by an ACE Certified Personal Trainer.

Name: FieldForge for Salesforce
Tagline: Bulk-create Salesforce fields from CSV & Excel
Topics: Chrome Extensions, Productivity, Open Source, Developer Tools, GitHub
Description: FieldForge helps Salesforce developers bulk-create custom fields from CSV and Excel files. Preview, edit, validate, and deploy fields safely using the Metadata API—all from a Chrome Extension. Unlike manual Setup or complex deployment tools, FieldForge provides metadata transparency, deployment logs, production safety checks, and zero credential storage.
